verdicts.reasoning: On page 829 the line for vi 10 clearly ends with the dative form Ῥάγῃ, showing final iota rather than sigma.

On the scan (p. 829, VI 10) the final letter is clearly an iota-subscript eta form, not final sigma, and this agrees with First1K and the usual diplomatic Vaticanus tradition reflected also in Cambridge/Tischendorf for the dative place-name.

notes: Only verse 10 was submitted because it was the sole disagreement verse provided.
